title: PlayerNotes
description: Manage notes about players by using commands and clickable actions. Optional name tag and tablist highlight.
body:
## Commands
(All Commands can be seen by running /PlayerNotes)
- /PlayerNotes view <name> - View all notes of the given player.
- /PlayerNotes add <name> <note> - Adds the given note to the given player.
- /PlayerNotes listOnline - Lists all players that have notes and are currently online, including a view button.
- /PlayerNotes list - Lists all players that have notes, including a view button.

Example: /PlayerNotes add notch Likes trading emeralds.

To delete a note, run /PlayerNotes view <name> and click on the delete button (recommended). Alternatively, run /PlayerNotes del <name> <id>.

## More Features
- Noted players have a **prefix** above their **name tag** (toggleable in config)
- Noted players are **displayed first in tablist with a prefix** (toggleable in config)
- If the noted player **changes their name, the old name** will be shown in parentheses.
- If you want to see the **creation date** of a note, hover over it with your mouse.

## Hints
- If you want to create a **personal note**, just create a note for your own username.
- This mod pairs nicely with [PlayerPrefixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerprefixes), which lets you assign custom prefixes to players

## Privacy

Your notes are not sent to any server.

## Dependencies

No need to install any other mod than [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

Please note that [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required to access the config GUI.
## Questions? Issues? Feature Requests?
Feel free to join the Discord ( https://www.lucasedvk.de/discord ) or send me a PM on Discord (Lucas.EDVK).

Issues and feature requests are encouraged to be reported on GitLab. Discord is also fine. Thank you!!

## Quality Assurance

My code and description are at least 90 % human-written. Only the icon was made using generative AI.
Also, my goal is to port to new Minecraft versions asap. All my mods were updated from 1.21. within 1 week of the release of 26.1.

#HumanWritten

## Special Thanks

Special Thanks to Motschen for providing this awesome config library with jar-in-jar option!
https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen
